chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-274 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on MA 2313/25 2.For orders on office objection 3.For orders on MA 2314/25 4.For hearing of main case 14-11-2025 None present for the applicant. **** None present for the applicant; no intimation is received. However, on perusal of the impugned order dated 28.02.2025, passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge-III, MCTC-II, Sukkur, granting pre-arrest bail to the respondent No.2/accused on the ground that the alleged offence does not fall within the prohibitory clause of Section 497 CrPC, being punishable up to three years, besides other grounds. No illegality or infirmity is found in the impugned order. Accordingly, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed in limine along with the listed application(s). JUDGE Ahmad
